page_metadata.biotools__summary: Analyze lineage- and mutation-specific cell surface transcriptome marker from patient cancer samples. It is a fast and efficient tool to find novel tumor-specific cell surface markers for advanced cancer therapies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Analyze lineage- and mutation-specific cell surface transcriptome marker from patient cancer samples. It is a fast and efficient tool to find novel tumor-specific cell surface markers for advanced cancer therapies.
